jdk.incubator.vector/Float16/fma.name: fma
signatures: public static Float16 fma(Float16 a, Float16 b, Float16 c)
jdk.incubator.vector/Float16/fma.description:
Returns the fused multiply add of the three arguments; that is,
returns the exact product of the first two arguments summed
with the third argument and then rounded once to the nearestFloat16.

info.excerpt:
Returns the fused multiply add of the three arguments; that is,
returns the exact product of the first two arguments summed
with the third argument and then rounded once to the nearestFloat16.

the bits in the given bitmask, starting with the least
significant bit, and continuing up to the sign bit.

significant bit, and continuing up to the sign bit.
